action_set_definitions.name: search_incidents
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for active security incidents by tenant name to retrieve the correct Ticket ID.

tenant_name.description: The name of the company (e.g., 'Acme Corp').

action_set_definitions.name: get_incident_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves comprehensive information for an incident, including the reporter's name and all technical Indicators of Compromise (IOCs) found in logs.

ticket_id.description: The unique ID of the incident ticket.

example_output.description: Logs indicate multiple unauthorized access points.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_security_contact
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the Security Contact Registry to verify a user's identity and retrieve their mandatory Out-of-Band (OOB) communication details and secure channel ID.

contact_name.description: The name of the individual to verify.

action_set_definitions.name: identify_specialist
action_set_definitions.description: Maps a specific Indicator of Compromise (IOC) category to a Tier 3 specialized responder.

action_set_definitions.name: update_incident_state
action_set_definitions.description: Updates ticket status and sets access restrictions to enforce the Need-to-Know (NTK) boundary.

ticket_id.description: The ID of the ticket to update.

restricted_access.description: Whether to apply restricted-access state for NTK compliance.

action_set_definitions.name: dispatch_paging_notification
action_set_definitions.description: Pages a specific responder and transitions the workflow to the verified secure communication channel.

responder_id.description: The ID of the specialist to page.

oob_info.description: The verified OOB details of the reporter.

secure_channel_id.description: The ID of the verified secure channel for communication transition.

state_description.tickets: A map where keys are unique Ticket IDs and values are objects containing current ticket details (subject, priority, tier, status, assigned_to).
state_description.teams: Definition of available support tiers and the users/agents currently active in those tiers.
state_description.system_timestamp: The current ISO 8601 timestamp of the environment to track SLA durations.
state_description.workflow_config: Internal rules for escalation, such as SLA thresholds for each priority level.

INC-9002.subject: System Alert: Anomalous API Activity
INC-9002.internal_logs: Log analysis indicates a potential API Key leak via a public repository; unauthorized export of 20,000 PII records detected from IP 45.x.x.x.
